title: Simple Radio Redone
description: Resource pack for the Simple Voice Radio mod.
body:
# Simple Radio Redone
A resource pack for [Simple Voice Radio](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-radio), which is an addon for [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) that adds long-distance communication via radios.

- All block and item textures have been redone
- Style still very similar to the original mod

![All the item sprites on a white background with a blue border around them.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62d90037e57f12e4e6c6058da97bf751f4ccdeb1.png)

_Included are sprites for a currently unreleased update for Simple Voice Radio_
_Full support for that version will be added once publicly released_

![The front and back of the Radio block, and the Radiosmithing Station sitting on some grass next to a wooden pillar.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b53c922e5d243e776eab538b3ba5ae1aa087bda.png)
